step1.title: 📍 Required Info
step1.namePlaceholder: Please enter name on national ID/passport
step1.departmentPlaceholder: e.g., Dept of EE 4B / NTU EE / Company Name
step1.lineIdPlaceholder: For officers to create event contact groups

step2.title: 📍 Basic Info (Optional)
step2.idNumberPlaceholder: For mountain entry permits and travel insurance
step2.addressPlaceholder: Please enter your contact or current address

step3.title: 📍 Safety & Emergency Info (Optional)
step3.emerNamePlaceholder: Name of family member or friend
step3.medicalHistoryPlaceholder: e.g., asthma, severe altitude sickness, allergies. Confidential & only for leader to ensure safety.

step4.title: 📍 Experience & Upload (Optional)
step4.expPlaceholder: e.g., Hehuanshan, Yushan Main Peak, Jiaming Lake...
step4.strengthPlaceholder: e.g., 5000m run in 25 mins, hiking record, marathon...
step4.uploadTip: Tip: Re-uploading will overwrite old proof files. Max 5 images.
step4.privacyConsent: I agree to use my personal data for event insurance, entry permits, and emergency contact.
step4.intendOfficialYes: I want to become a member (50% off gear rental)
